values.value:
Dear {!Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!!
We are pleased to inform you that the possession process and detailed guidelines for your unit are now available on the Runwal Connect App.
Please find your unit details below for reference:
Project: {!Project__r.Name} Unit Number: {!Unit_No__r.Name} Tower/Wing: {!Tower__r.Name}
The guidelines outline the step-by-step possession process, required documentation, and important instructions to help ensure a smooth and timely handover of your home.
We request you to log in to the Runwal Connect App and review the guidelines carefully, and complete the necessary steps as mentioned.
For any assistance, please feel free to connect with your Relationship Manager.
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises
Possession Process & Guidelines for Your Unit

Possession Guidelines Available 🏡
Your possession process and guidelines are now live on the app. Please review for a smooth handover.
